name: io.github.PaulieB14/graph-aave-mcp
description: AAVE V2/V3/V4 MCP server — 40 tools across 16 Graph subgraphs + Aave V4 API. Lending markets, cross-chain liquidation risk monitoring, health factors, governance, V4 hubs/spokes, exchange rates, and protocol history.

environmentVariables.description: API key for The Graph network. Required for V2/V3 subgraph and liquidation risk tools. Get one free at https://thegraph.com/studio/apikeys/
environmentVariables.name: GRAPH_API_KEY
